Global (All).title: North Korea fires ballistic missile, escalating tensions with US
Global (All).summary: North Korea has fired a ballistic missile, prompting a strong condemnation from the US and its allies.

Global (All).title: Global economy at risk of recession amid interest rate hikes
Global (All).summary: The global economy is facing a high risk of recession as interest rate hikes continue to weigh on growth.

Global (All).title: Cyber attacks on critical infrastructure increase amid global tensions
Global (All).summary: There has been an increase in cyber attacks on critical infrastructure worldwide, raising concerns about national security and economic stability.

United States.title: Mass Shooting in Highland Park, Illinois
United States.summary: A mass shooting occurred in Highland Park, Illinois, on July 4, 2022, killing 7 people and injuring over 40.

United States.title: Supreme Court Overturns Roe v. Wade
United States.summary: The US Supreme Court overturned the landmark decision in Roe v. Wade, allowing states to restrict or ban abortion.

United States.title: US-Afghanistan Conflict Escalates
United States.summary: The US-Afghanistan conflict escalated after a drone strike killed an Afghan family, sparking outrage and protests in Afghanistan.

Concerns rise regarding the spread of the highly contagious Delta subvariant BQ.1 in South Korea (6-Jul-2026) [2]

South Korea.title: COVID-19 cases reach 20-year high in Korea
South Korea.summary: South Korea reports record-breaking number of COVID-19 cases as summer heat intensifies (4-Jul-2026) [3]

Japan.title: Magnitude 7.4 Earthquake strikes off the coast of northeastern Japan, triggering a tsunami warning. Damage and casualties reported.
Japan.summary: A powerful earthquake struck off the coast of northeastern Japan, triggering a tsunami warning and causing widespread damage and injuries.

Japan.title: Japan PM Fumio Kishida cancels US, Indonesia trip over health concerns
Japan.summary: Japan's Prime Minister Fumio Kishida has canceled a planned trip to the US and Indonesia due to health concerns, the Prime Minister's Office announced on 30 June

Japan.title: Japan's exports fall in May as weak global demand bites
Japan.summary: Japan's merchandise exports tumbled 7.9% in May, the Ministry of Finance said, reflecting a decline in chip shipments and weak global demand
